icpStages.Stage 1 – Awareness: Attract new eyeballs. Top-of-funnel. Broad crypto audience.
icpStages.Stage 2 – Education: Build trust via data-driven insights. Showcase frameworks.
icpStages.Stage 3 – Consideration: Position CS Platinum as the professional solution.
icpStages.Stage 4 – Conversion: Direct CTA to CWB event or Platinum signup.
icpStages.Stage 5 – Retention: Deepen engagement with existing members. Podcast, newsletter.

cards.title: LinkedIn Post — MVRV Bitcoin Bottom Signal

brief.hook: One indicator has called every single Bitcoin bottom. It is flashing again right now.
brief.angle: On-chain educational post. Explains MVRV ratio, historical bottoms (2012/2015/2020/2022), what the signal means today. Ends with save prompt.
brief.cta: Save this and come back in 6 months.
brief.copy:
One indicator has called every single Bitcoin bottom. It is flashing again right now.

The MVRV ratio triggered at every major low: 2012, 2015, 2020, 2022. We are approaching that zone again.

MVRV = Market Value to Realised Value. It compares Bitcoin's current price to the average price all holders actually paid.

When this drops to the bottom zone, the majority of holders are at a loss. That is historically when bottoms form. Long-term holders sell. New buyers step in. Those buyers hold until the market pushes back up.

One signal among many. But one of the most reliable in Bitcoin history.

Save this and come back in 6 months.

#Bitcoin #MVRV #OnChainAnalysis #BitcoinBottom #CollectiveShift

videos.title: How Influencers Actually Make Money (Trust & Incentives)

brief.hook: Most people don't realise how influencers actually make money in the digital asset space.
brief.angle: Educational breakdown of influencer revenue model (views, sponsorships, affiliate commissions). Conflict of interest framing. Ends with independent research as the alternative.
brief.cta: No CTA. Value post. Profile link does the work.
brief.copy:
Most people don't realise how influencers actually make money in the digital asset space.

There are three main revenue streams. Views, sponsorships, and affiliate commissions. The affiliate part is the one that should concern you.

When an influencer shares a link to an exchange or a platform, they earn a commission every time you sign up. Some of those deals pay per trade. Meaning the more you trade, the more they earn. They are literally incentivised by your activity, not your results.

In traditional finance, this is called a conflict of interest. If a financial advisor recommended stocks based on which company paid them the highest referral fee, they'd lose their licence. In digital assets, there's no licence to lose.

Here's the simple test I use. Look at how someone makes their money. If their revenue goes up when you trade more, they don't care whether you win or lose. They need you active. That's their business model.

Now compare that to independent research. A research firm makes money when you stay subscribed. You only stay subscribed if the research is good. The incentive is aligned with your outcome.

This is why I've always believed the research model is the only one that works long term for investors. Follow the incentive. It'll tell you everything you need to know about who to trust.

videos.title: The Market Returns Digital Assets Are Actually Producing Right Now (April 2026)

brief.hook: Global uncertainty is at record highs. Higher than 2008. Higher than COVID. Higher than 9/11.
brief.angle: Data-driven perspective on the current sell-off.
brief.cta: No hard CTA. Value post. Link in bio.
brief.copy:
Global uncertainty is at record highs. Higher than 2008. Higher than COVID. Higher than 9/11.

Gold is down. Stocks are down. Digital assets are down. This is what maximum fear looks and feels like.

But here is what the data actually shows.

Fear and Greed just hit 5. That is the lowest sentiment ever recorded for digital assets. Lower than FTX. Lower than Luna. Lower than every sell-off in history.

Bitcoin is down 45% from all-time highs. Most altcoins are down 70 to 90%. Cardano needs a 1,000% move just to get back to where it was.

So what do you actually do here?

For us, right now is about capital protection. Not a time to be aggressive on altcoins. Not a time to try and be a hero and call the exact bottom.

Anything below $70,000 Bitcoin, in our view, is good long-term value. The 200-week moving average sits around $58,000. That has been the accumulation zone in every previous cycle.

The play is simple. Deploy gradually. Average in. Do not try to time the absolute bottom because no one can.

Time in the market fixes a timing problem. If you bought at $120,000, the answer is not to take on more risk. The answer is patience and discipline.

Peak uncertainty does not mean peak danger. It means peak emotion. And that is where most people make mistakes.

The Market Returns Digital Assets Are Actually Producing Right Now (April 2026)

Global uncertainty is at record highs and digital asset sentiment has never been lower. In this episode, Ben and Bergs break down exactly how they are positioning, the frameworks for capital protection, and the mindset that separates investors who build wealth from those who give it all back.

Key Takeaways:
- The World Uncertainty Index is at historical highs, twice the level of COVID
- Fear and Greed has hit 5, the lowest ever recorded for digital assets
- Bitcoin is down 45% from ATH, most altcoins down 70-90%
- Capital protection is the priority. Not a time to be aggressive on altcoins
- Anything below $70K Bitcoin is good long-term value (200-week MA at $58K)
- Deploy gradually. Average in. Do not try to time the bottom
- The assets that outperform coming out of bear markets are fundamentally strong
- Syrup up 140% and Hyperliquid up 25% vs average altcoin down 35% over 12 months

brief.hook: The World Uncertainty Index is at historical highs. Twice the level of COVID.
brief.angle: Professional framing. Macro context. Data-driven positioning.
brief.copy:
The World Uncertainty Index is at historical highs. Twice the level of COVID.

Tech stocks are unwinding. Microsoft is down 24% from all-time highs. Amazon employees are living in perpetual fear of AI-driven layoffs. US home sales data is the worst in years.

Digital assets are not immune. Bitcoin is down 45% from its peak. The Fear and Greed index just hit 5, the lowest sentiment ever recorded.

But this is not the first time.

Bitcoin has drawn down 75-80% multiple times in its 15-year history. It remains the most liquid asset class in the world, which is exactly why it sells off first during uncertainty. People go to crypto for liquidity.

For us at Collective Shift, right now is about capital protection.

We are not adding risk into altcoins. We are accumulating Bitcoin gradually at what we view as long-term value below $70,000. We are deploying systematically, not trying to time the exact bottom.

The assets that outperform coming out of these periods tend to be fundamentally strong. In the last 12 months, Syrup is up 140% and Hyperliquid is up 25% while the average altcoin is down 35%.

Peak uncertainty does not mean peak danger. It means peak emotion. And that is where discipline separates the investors who build wealth from the ones who give it all back.

Full breakdown with Bergs on this week's podcast. Link in comments.

#Bitcoin #DigitalAssets #Investing #RiskManagement #CollectiveShift

brief.hook: The worst sentiment ever recorded. Here is what we are doing.
brief.angle: Email to subscriber list. Calm, data-led.
brief.cta: Watch the full episode with Bergs.
brief.copy:
Subject: The worst sentiment ever recorded. Here is what we are doing.
Preview: Peak uncertainty does not mean peak danger.

Global uncertainty is at record highs. Higher than 2008. Higher than COVID. Higher than 9/11.

Gold is down. Stocks are down. Digital assets are down. The Fear and Greed index just hit 5. That is the lowest sentiment ever recorded for digital assets.

Bitcoin is down 45% from all-time highs. Most altcoins are down 70-90%.

So what are we actually doing?

Right now, it is about capital protection. We are not adding risk into altcoins. We are accumulating Bitcoin gradually at what we view as long-term value below $70,000.

The 200-week moving average sits around $58,000. In every previous cycle, that zone has been the accumulation window.

The play is simple. Deploy gradually. Average in. Do not try to time the absolute bottom.

If you have capital to deploy, start small. Even 10% of what you plan to invest. Then add more over weeks and months. In a year, the exact price you bought at will not matter. What will matter is that you actually bought.

The biggest mistake I see right now is people who are down trying to take on more risk to make it back fast. That is how you lose your capital. Time is on your side.

Peak uncertainty does not mean peak danger. It means peak emotion.

Bergs and I broke down the full framework in this week's episode.

Watch it here: [YouTube link]

Ben

P.S. If you want to see exactly how we are positioning and get access to our research, check out how we work with thousands of investors: https://collectiveshift.net/trainingvslv5

brief.hook: Fear and Greed just hit 5. Lowest ever recorded.
brief.copy:
SHORT 1 — The $100K Mistake: A mate told me he was down over $100K. 90% altcoins. No rebalancing. Hadn't told his wife.

SHORT 2 — Fear and Greed at 5: Lowest sentiment ever recorded. Lower than FTX. Lower than Luna. Peak uncertainty does not mean peak danger.

SHORT 3 — The $10 Rule: If you have $100, put $10 in today. Stop trying to time the bottom.

If you have capital to deploy, start small. Even 10% of what you plan to invest. Then add more over weeks and months. In a year, the exact price you bought at will not matter. What will matter is that you actually bought.

The biggest mistake I see right now is people who are down trying to take on more risk to make it back fast. That is how you lose your capital. Time is on your side.

Peak uncertainty does not mean peak danger. It means peak emotion.

Bergs and I broke down the full framework in this week's episode.

Watch it here: [YouTube link]

Ben

P.S. If you want to see exactly how we are positioning and get access to our research, check out how we work with thousands of investors: https://collectiveshift.net/trainingvslv5

cards.title: TikTok + Shorts — Market Returns April 2026
cards.copy:
SHORT 1 — The $100K Mistake: A mate told me he was down over $100K. 90% altcoins. No rebalancing. Hadn't told his wife.

SHORT 2 — Fear and Greed at 5: Lowest sentiment ever recorded. Lower than FTX. Lower than Luna. Peak uncertainty does not mean peak danger.

SHORT 3 — The $10 Rule: If you have $100, put $10 in today. Stop trying to time the bottom.
